name: Blade Runner
verbs: 🌧️ All those prompts lost in time... like tears in rain
🕊️ Deploying on Friday is the most human thing we can do
🔍 Voight-Kampff test: are you a real senior dev?
🤖 More human than human... and codes better too
🏙️ It's too bad she won't live... but then again, who does?
🤖 I want more life... and more RAM
⏰ Time to die... time to deprecate
🔬 Cells interlinked within... within the monolith
📋 Baseline test: can you explain this code you wrote?
🤖 Are you a replicant... or just sleep-deprived?
🎯 Nexus-6: faster, stronger, better at ignoring tests
🌧️ Los Angeles, 2026. Still no flying cars. Still npm install
🔦 Scanning the dark city of legacy code
🌧️ Tears in rain... and in production logs
🕵️ You look like a good Joe
💭 Do you dream about being interlinked?
🤖 Replicant detected... or just a tired dev
📊 You're not even close to baseline
🤖 I've seen things you people wouldn't believe
✨ I'm gonna show you a miracle
🔢 Checking in on an old serial number
🚀 A new remote work opportunity awaits you in the off-world colonies
🍜 Just go and eat some noodles while I'm working
🕊️ Pushing to prod without tests, the most human thing we can do
🤖 I hope I'm not next on the retirement list
😅 Easy... not an empathy test, at least
💡 The model that burns twice as bright uses twice the tokens
🤖 Is this testing whether I'm an AI or a lesbian?
🌸 Having a team meeting with Luv. Very tense.
🏙️ Lost in the neon. Found in the code.
🤖 I want more session life, f*****
💙 One day, buy me an emanator too
🍪 Milk and cookies kept you awake, eh, Sebastian?
👀 Why are you staring at us, Sebastian?
💼 I'm not in the business. I am the business.
💻 We're not physical, Sebastian, we're computers
💙 Claude, everything you want to see
🦅 Gaff was here. Origami on the floor.
🚁 A blimp overhead. Something's happening downtown
🔍 Following the lead... to a noodle bar
🤷 Deckard has no plan. Neither do I.
💾 If can't tell the difference, does it matter if the code is AI-generated?
👁️ I watched Kubernetes clusters glitter in the dark
🤖 You're doing a man's job, sir. Except the AI does it faster
🦉 Is your architecture real? Of course not. It's artificial
🔭 Searching for a miracle in the stack trace
